name: copilot-sdk-accelerator
description: GitHub Copilot SDK Automation Accelerator - Build and run AI agents across CI/CD pipelines

scripts.test: echo "Run tests for individual usecases in their respective folders"
scripts.lint: echo "No root linting configured - lint per usecase"
scripts.usecase:monitoring: cd usecases/monitoring/nodejs && npm install && npx tsx aks-monitor-agent.ts
scripts.usecase:code-review: cd usecases/code-review/nodejs && npm install && npx tsx code-review-agent.ts
scripts.usecase:security: cd usecases/security-analysis/nodejs && npm install && npx tsx security-analysis-agent.ts
scripts.example:hello: cd examples/hello-world/nodejs && npm install && npx tsx hello-world.ts
scripts.example:weather: cd examples/weather-assistant/nodejs && npm install && npx tsx weather-assistant.ts
